name: ComfyUI Skills OpenClaw
description: Expose curated ComfyUI workflows as callable skills/MCP capabilities for OpenClaw. Enables seamless image generation and ComfyUI pipeline automation directly from OpenClaw.
review: Exceptional quality, active development. Exposes curated ComfyUI workflows as callable skills/MCP capabilities for OpenClaw. Bridges ComfyUI's powerful image generation ecosystem with OpenClaw's skill framework, enabling seamless AI-driven image workflows.
